rights_holder: Mathew Brady (c. 1822–1896); image circa 1861, identified as free of known copyright restrictions
attribution: Mathew Brady, dead soldier, American Civil War, c. 1861. Public domain (pre-1929 publication).
subject: Civil War battlefield photograph. The Wikimedia file description states verbatim: "Photo was also selected by Edward Steichen for the exhibition The Family of Man in 1955" — a direct attestation of inclusion in the 1955 exhibition. The specific plate number in the MoMA Master Checklist has not been confirmed against our in-repo source data as of 2026-04-25 (Brady is not yet seeded in data/photographers.csv; Brady's plate falls within the still-unseeded portion of the 503-plate catalog, likely beyond plate #251).
